title: SpecRunnerStatus
description: Output of `spec-runner status --json` (spec_runner.cli_info.cmd_status). A FLAT run-level aggregate with NO per-task array — for per-task data use costs --json (costs.schema.json). Consumed by the spec-runner-vscode extension's RUN view (summary + budget). See docs/state-schema.md.

total_cost.description: Total cost in USD across all attempts (rounded to 2dp)

input_tokens.description: Total input tokens across all attempts

output_tokens.description: Total output tokens across all attempts

budget_usd.description: Configured global budget in USD, or null when unset
